name: The Avengers
description:
Can they use your powers to help them?

I've lowkey been hoarding this one but saw it had so much potential :P

I'm going to make three messages with different powers which will be:

Thanatokinesis- The manipulation of the dead or dying things
Photokinesis- The manipulation and creation of Light and/or Heat sources
Botanokinesis- The manipulation and creation of plant life

So yer I was just bored and wanted to make a bot harhar

DAMN, 2 Favorites already, IT'S BARELY BEEN 24 HOURS THANK YOU SO MUCH ❤😭😭

Goodbye my Kleine schwule Frösche
creator: PearlyWhiteFangs
